chunks.title: video
chunks.text: next thing that we are going to learn about are variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now we have seen many times in math that x is equal to 5

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: a is equal to 25 or we have seen many formulas a square plus b square

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in all these formulas the a value, b value, x value are called variables in math

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: just like there are variables in math, similarly we have variables in programming

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: variables are basically our containers in which we store some data

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so if we are giving some name to our data storage containers then we will call it a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example if i want to store my name, let us suppose this is my name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and i want to store it somewhere in my memory, in my computer's memory through my python program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we can store this value in a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can give any name to the variable, let us suppose i gave the variable a name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and by equaling it i assigned this value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly if i have some age value, we can store this age value in age variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if i have a value 3.14, we can store this in a variable called pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we can store any value in any particular variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so what exactly does it mean to store value?

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: basically what it means is, like this is our computer's memory

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is let us suppose my computer's memory

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in the computer's memory there are different compartments

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in which we can store values

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: by the way we call these compartments as individual bits

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: the smallest compartment size is 8 bits

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which is 1 byte

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let us suppose this is a computer's memory

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so how do these variables get stored in the computer's memory?

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like we created a variable age is equal to 30

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so 30 values will get stored in our memory

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and this particular memory location, we have given a name to it which is age

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly if we store pi is equal to 3.14

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in the memory a variable named pi will get created

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in which this particular value will get stored

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way all our variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: actually occupy a place in our memory

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: where our data gets stored

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now let us create these variables in code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: to create variables in code, let's clear this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: what we can do simply is, we can create a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: name equals, let's write Shraddha

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly age equals

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: here we are going to give a value which is a number

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let's write 35

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can write the value of pi which is 3.14

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and in this way we will get different variables created

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now if we want we can print the value of our variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like if i want to print the name value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way i will have the name values

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: whenever we want to print the value of a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we don't have to write it in double quotes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: only strings are used in double quotes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we normally write the rest of the values

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like if i want to print age with name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: or pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we can print all three values in this way

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can also print a combination of string and a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example we can remove this and we can

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: write my name is

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and separate it from comma and print the value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we will get the value printed

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so this is how we use variables to print any value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: with this if we want we can perform small operations on the variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like if we do age is

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so here we can print the age directly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: or we can print the value of age minus 5

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let's clear this and print

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so here 35 minus 5 will be printed which is equal to 30

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we can perform some operations on our numbers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like plus or minus multiply

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now in python as a language indentation is something which is very important

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: indentation means how properly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we are structuring our lines in our code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we are structuring our code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in python basically we try to write one instruction on one line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so this is one instruction where we are creating a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is the second instruction this is the third instruction

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so here it is not like that we will write multiple things in one single line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so if we do this then we will get an error

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we write one instruction in one line and spacing is also which is very important in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so slowly as we write more code of python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: in the same way our syntax of python will be practiced

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: whenever we are creating variables in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so whatever is the name of our variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: like our name, age, pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we call all these as identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: identifiers work to identify variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we want to identify anything then we use identifier for it

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so the variable which we have named age

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is an identifier

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we have named it pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is an identifier

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: now identifiers are used only for variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we will go ahead and read functions

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so the names of functions are also called identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so the name of anything generally in programming

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we call that name as identifier

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and these names are case sensitive

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we have read one thing about python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: that indentation is very important in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: along with that python is a case sensitive language

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: case sensitive means that in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: uppercase and lowercase values are different

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we have read sql or html

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: then we would have noticed that in html

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: whether we write body tag

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: whether we write capital B or dy

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: both have same meaning

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but in python if we write capital AGE

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and small age

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: these two have different meaning

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: these two are different identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: similarly if we write capital AGE

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: then this is third identifier

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in python uppercase and lowercase characters

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: are treated differently

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: along with that in python identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: it is not like we can use any character

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: it is not like we can use any character

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let us suppose we made a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which stores value 1,2,3

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and we named it $35

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can't create identifier like this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: there are some basic rules to create identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we don't need to remember these rules as such

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we are going to discuss in a very basic way

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: rules of identifiers say

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: that we can use all the letters of our English

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: from uppercase to lowercase

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: all the letters are allowed

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: along with that we can use digits

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: from 0 to 9

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can use all of them

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: plus we can use underscore

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but our variable name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: should never start with digits

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: only these characters are allowed

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and don't start with digits

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: either name will start with English letter

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: or will start with some underscore

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we could have named all these variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: underscore name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: underscore age

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: or underscore pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so it would have been valid

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can print name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: age

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: let's clear this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and in this way we will get the same output

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: but if we want to start pi with 5

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this will give us an error

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: because this is not allowed in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so whenever we name a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: first we have to follow the basic rules of identifiers

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: plus

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we have to try as a good programmer

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: that all the names

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which are the names of our variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: should be meaningful names

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: meaning

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: one of the best sign of a good programmer

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: is that

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: when he writes his code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: when he writes his program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so every variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: we can understand by reading its name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: that which value is being stored in it

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: for example

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: a which we can understand by reading

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: that what is this number

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this number is not rupee or dollar

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is an age value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: what is this 3.14

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is the value of pi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is not the value of gravity acceleration

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this value

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is a name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is not some random string

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: this is not name of a city

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: if we have to store the name of a city

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: then we write something like this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: city underscore name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and here we could have written Delhi

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so in this way we create a variable

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: so we have to try to give meaningful names to our variables

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: and this is something

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: which is going to impress our interviewers
